FARKLE.farkleHint: Play Farkle by rolling dice and collecting points. Keep dice to save them for the next round, or roll again to collect more points. But be careful, if you don't score any points, you lose your turn!
FARKLE.selectPlayers: Please select at least one player to start a game. Drag and drop actors into the list or click on 'Add Player'.
FARKLE.selectYourCharacter: Select your character for this game. Other players can join via the lobby.
FARKLE.loadedDice: The dice are loaded! You can use them in this game.
FARKLE.noDiceKept: You can only roll if you keep at least one die.
FARKLE.hotDice: Hot dice, roll all 6 dice again!
FARKLE.diceAreBurning: The dice are burning! You were able to keep all dice and can now roll all 6 dice again!
FARKLE.loadDiceDescription: Create loaded dice that you can use in Farkle. These dice can be used when they are found in the inventory of the respective player. Drag and drop an item into the area below to edit it.
FARKLE.pickLoadedDiceDescription: One or more of your characters have loaded dice in their inventory. You can select them here to use them in the Farkle game.
FARKLE.dragItemInstructions: Drag an item from a character's inventory into this area to create loaded dice.
FARKLE.noCharacterSelected: Please select a character for each player!
FARKLE.noPlayersSelected: Please select at least one player with a character!
FARKLE.lobbyDescription: Create a new game or join an active game
FARKLE.createFirstGame: Create your first game with the button above
FARKLE.gameEnded: The game has been ended by the creator
FARKLE.joinModeDescription: Do you want to join the game and play or just spectate?
FARKLE.roundReset: Round has been reset - all points set to 0
FARKLE.winnerPromptNewRound: Play another round? You can set a new target score below.
FARKLE.debugHint: When enabled, the Farkle module will log extra diagnostic information to the browser console.
FARKLE.soundEffectsHint: Enable sound effects during gameplay (rolling, keeping dice, achievements, etc.)
FARKLE.rollAnimationsHint: Enable animated dice rolling effects when rolling dice
FARKLE.defaultTargetScoreHint: Default target score for new games (Standard mode)
FARKLE.loadedDiceHint: Create loaded dice for the game (GMs only)
FARKLE.resetStatsHint: Resets all achievements and statistics for all players. This action cannot be undone.
FARKLE.resetStatsConfirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all statistics and achievements for all players? This action cannot be undone.
FARKLE.resetStatsSuccess: All Farkle statistics and achievements have been reset.
FARKLE.noCharactersFound: No characters found for this player.

achievements.highRollerDesc: Score 1500+ points in a single turn

FARKLE.apiUrlHint: URL to the Verwaltung - Dimensionarium API (e.g., http://localhost:5000/api)
FARKLE.apiKeyHint: Shared secret key for the API
FARKLE.playersRemovedNoCoins: The following players were removed because they do not have enough Schillinge: {names}
FARKLE.noPlayersLeft: No players left. The game is ending.
FARKLE.playAgainQuery: The game creator wants to start a new round. Stake: {stake} Schillinge. Do you want to play again? (30 seconds remaining)
FARKLE.waitingForPlayers: Waiting for other players to respond (30s timeout)...
FARKLE.insufficientPlayers: Not enough players for a new round.
